tasks.subject: Task 1: Drizzle schema + migration for cashflow tables
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add recurrence_groups, pay_cadences, expected_events + alters on categories/transactions/users/payslips per spec §3.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/db/schema.ts`
- Create: `lib/db/migrations/<NNNN>_cashflow_runway.sql`
- Test: `tests/unit/db/schema.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm run db:generate -- --check` exits 0; `npm test -- tests/unit/db/schema.test.ts` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/db/schema.ts","lib/db/migrations/","tests/unit/db/schema.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/unit/db/schema.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["new tables export from schema.ts","alters present on existing tables","npm run db:generate produces single migration","npm run db:migrate applies cleanly","partial index expected_events_pending_idx exists","RLS policies on all three new tables"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Branded TypeScript types for cashflow entities
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Branded ID types and shared interfaces so domain functions compose cleanly.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/types/cashflow.ts`
- Test: `tests/unit/types/cashflow.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test -- tests/unit/types/cashflow.test.ts` passes; `npx tsc --noEmit` succeeds.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/types/cashflow.ts","tests/unit/types/cashflow.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx tsc --noEmit && npm test -- tests/unit/types/cashflow.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["branded RecurrenceGroupId, PayCadenceId, ExpectedEventId","interfaces DetectedRecurrence, PayCadenceCandidate, RunwayPoint, ExpectedEvent, CalendarDay, DirectDebit, LiquidityPreview","string-literal unions Cadence, RecurrenceStatus, ExpectedEventStatus, ExpectedEventSource, DirectDebitKind","type smoke tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Recurrence detector pure function + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** detectRecurrence(txs, opts) returns DetectedRecurrence[]. Pure function used by projection worker and (later) subscription dashboard.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/domain/recurrence.ts`
- Test: `tests/unit/domain/recurrence.test.ts`
- Fixtures: `tests/fixtures/cashflow-runway/recurrence/{monthly-netflix,fortnightly-rent,random-noise}.json`

**Verify:** `npm test -- tests/unit/domain/recurrence.test.ts` passes (3 cases).

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/domain/recurrence.ts","tests/unit/domain/recurrence.test.ts","tests/fixtures/cashflow-runway/recurrence/"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/unit/domain/recurrence.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["detects monthly Netflix from 3 charges","detects fortnightly rent from 4 charges","returns 0 for unrelated noise","signature matches spec §5.3","groups carry memberTransactionIds for back-link"]}
```

tasks.description:
**Goal:** detectPayCadence(creditTxs, opts) returns PayCadenceCandidate[]. Pure.

**Files:**

- Test: `tests/unit/domain/pay-cadence.test.ts`
- Fixtures: `tests/fixtures/cashflow-runway/pay-cadence/{fortnightly-acme,irregular}.json`

**Verify:** `npm test -- tests/unit/domain/pay-cadence.test.ts` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/domain/pay-cadence.ts","lib/domain/_stats.ts","tests/unit/domain/pay-cadence.test.ts","tests/fixtures/cashflow-runway/pay-cadence/"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/unit/domain/pay-cadence.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["detects fortnightly ACME payroll","returns 0 for irregular credits","filters to credits >= minAmount (default $100)","groups by employer pattern","shared stats helpers extracted to _stats.ts"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Runway projection pure function + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** projectRunway(startBalance, events, horizonDays, today) -> RunwayPoint[].

- Test: `tests/unit/domain/runway.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test -- tests/unit/domain/runway.test.ts` passes.

{"files":["lib/domain/runway.ts","tests/unit/domain/runway.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/unit/domain/runway.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["output length = horizonDays + 1","flat balance when no events","subtracts outflow on expected_date and propagates","ignores events past horizon","low/high reflect range bands","deterministic (today is parameterised)"]}
```

tasks.description:

**Verify:** `npm test -- tests/unit/domain/direct-debits.test.ts` passes (table of cases).

{"files":["lib/domain/direct-debits.ts","tests/unit/domain/direct-debits.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/unit/domain/direct-debits.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["returns dd_mandate for DD/DEFT/DIRECT DEBIT tokens","returns bpay for BPAY tokens","returns merchant_pull for non-DD non-BPAY non-transfer","returns null for TFR/INTERNAL TRANSFER"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: project-expected-events worker + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Materialise expected_events from recurrence_groups + pay_cadences. Idempotent. Honours re-materialisation contract per spec §3.7.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/jobs/project-expected-events.ts`
- Modify: `lib/jobs/index.ts` (register pg-boss handler + nightly schedule + fanout)
- Test: `tests/integration/jobs/project-expected-events.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test -- tests/integration/jobs/project-expected-events.test.ts` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/jobs/project-expected-events.ts","lib/jobs/index.ts","tests/integration/jobs/project-expected-events.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/integration/jobs/project-expected-events.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["materialises monthly outflow as 3 events over 90d","idempotent across runs","manual rows survive","snoozed/dismissed/matched rows survive","cancelled groups produce no rows","single db transaction","pg-boss handler registered","nightly cron fanout per active user"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: match-expected-events worker + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On new transaction, mark closest pending/snoozed event as matched per spec §5.4.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/jobs/match-expected-events.ts`
- Modify: `lib/jobs/index.ts` (register handler)
- Test: `tests/integration/jobs/match-expected-events.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test -- tests/integration/jobs/match-expected-events.test.ts` passes (closest, no-match, snoozed-still-matchable).

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/jobs/match-expected-events.ts","lib/jobs/index.ts","tests/integration/jobs/match-expected-events.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/integration/jobs/match-expected-events.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["matches closest event by (date_delta, amount_delta)","sign+amount band filtering correct","snoozed events also matchable","returns null when no candidate","updates status to matched and sets matched_transaction_id"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: Wire detectors into ingest pipeline + match worker on insert
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Statement parse completion triggers refreshRecurrencesForUser; transaction insert enqueues match-expected-events.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/jobs/refresh-recurrences.ts`
- Modify: `lib/jobs/parse-statement.ts` (call refreshRecurrencesForUser at end)
- Modify: transaction-insert pathway (enqueue match-expected-events)
- Create: `lib/db/migrations/<NNNN>_recurrence_groups_unique.sql` (unique index for upsert)
- Test: `tests/integration/jobs/refresh-recurrences.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm test -- tests/integration/jobs/refresh-recurrences.test.ts` passes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/jobs/refresh-recurrences.ts","lib/jobs/parse-statement.ts","lib/db/migrations/","tests/integration/jobs/refresh-recurrences.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/integration/jobs/refresh-recurrences.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["upserts recurrence_groups with unique key (user_id, merchant_id-or-pattern)","upserts pay_cadences but never overrides active manual cadences","enqueues project-expected-events after detection","transaction insert enqueues match-expected-events","idempotent: second run produces same group count"]}
```
